name: Victory Celebration
description: Celebratory post after a Demo Brand win. High-energy visual with triumphant imagery and emphatic messaging to rally the fanbase.

subheadline.example: A dominant performance secures three points

guidelines: Use celebration footage — players celebrating, crowd cheering, fist pumps. Confetti or particle effects overlay the video. Tone is triumphant and energetic. The headline should convey pride and excitement. Blue and white color scheme intensified. Suitable for Reels and TikTok with trending audio.
